english: Open a box.

translations.en: Open a box.
translations.ja: 箱を開けて。

english: Where is the bus?

translations.en: Where is the bus?
translations.ja: バスはどこですか？

english: Show me a big map.

translations.en: Show me a big map.
translations.ja: 大きな地図を見せてください。

english: Please wait for a small bus.

translations.en: Please wait for a small bus.
translations.ja: 小さなバスを待っていてください。

english: Help me now.

translations.en: Help me now.
translations.ja: 今すぐ助けて。

english: Give me some water.

translations.en: Give me some water.
translations.ja: お水をください。

english: It is very hot today.

translations.en: It is very hot today.
translations.ja: 今日はとても暑いです。

english: Look at that big blue sea.

translations.en: Look at that big blue sea.
translations.ja: あの大きな青い海を見て。

english: Where is it?

translations.en: Where is it?
translations.ja: それはどこですか？

english: Call for help now.

translations.en: Call for help now.
translations.ja: 今すぐ助けを呼んで。

english: I am very hungry now.

translations.en: I am very hungry now.
translations.ja: 今、とてもお腹が空いています。

english: Wait for the green light now.

translations.en: Wait for the green light now.
translations.ja: 今、青信号を待ってください。

english: Put it here please.

translations.en: Put it here please.
translations.ja: ここに置いてください。

english: Where is the main exit?

translations.en: Where is the main exit?
translations.ja: メインの出口はどこですか？

english: Please open the heavy front door.

translations.en: Please open the heavy front door.
translations.ja: 重い玄関のドアを開けてください。

english: Look at me.

translations.en: Look at me.
translations.ja: 私を見て。

english: Close the gate now.

translations.en: Close the gate now.
translations.ja: 今すぐ門を閉めて。

english: I need a new pen.

translations.en: I need a new pen.
translations.ja: 新しいペンが必要です。

english: The bus is coming very soon.

translations.en: The bus is coming very soon.
translations.ja: バスがもうすぐ来ます。

english: Sit down here.

translations.en: Sit down here.
translations.ja: ここに座って。

english: Give me the key.

translations.en: Give me the key.
translations.ja: 鍵をください。

english: Where is the hotel now?

translations.en: Where is the hotel now?
translations.ja: ホテルは今どこですか？

english: Buy a small bottle of water.

translations.en: Buy a small bottle of water.
translations.ja: 小さなボトルの水を買って。

english: Stand up now.

translations.en: Stand up now.
translations.ja: 今すぐ立って。

english: Wash your face now.

translations.en: Wash your face now.
translations.ja: 今すぐ顔を洗って。

english: I like to draw.

translations.en: I like to draw.
translations.ja: 描くのが好きです。

english: She is my new friend.

translations.en: She is my new friend.
translations.ja: 彼女は私の新しい友達です。

english: We are very happy today morning.

translations.en: We are very happy today morning.
translations.ja: 今日の朝、私たちはとても幸せです。

english: I want to go to the park.

translations.en: I want to go to the park.
translations.ja: 公園へ行きたいです。

english: Let us play soccer in the school field.

translations.en: Let us play soccer in the school field.
translations.ja: 学校の校庭でサッカーをしましょう。

english: I will call you.

translations.en: I will call you.
translations.ja: 電話しますね。

english: Do you like this music?

translations.en: Do you like this music?
translations.ja: この音楽は好きですか？

english: They are eating a big cake now.

translations.en: They are eating a big cake now.
translations.ja: 彼らは今、大きなケーキを食べています。

english: I want to eat some sweet oranges.

translations.en: I want to eat some sweet oranges.
translations.ja: 甘いオレンジを食べたいです。

english: Can you help me with this homework today?

translations.en: Can you help me with this homework today?
translations.ja: 今日、この宿題を手伝ってくれますか？

english: Look at that cat.

translations.en: Look at that cat.
translations.ja: あの猫を見て。

english: What is your favorite color?

translations.en: What is your favorite color?
translations.ja: あなたの一番好きな色は何ですか？

english: Tell me a very nice story.

translations.en: Tell me a very nice story.
translations.ja: とても素敵なお話を聞かせて。

english: I like to sing a song together.

translations.en: I like to sing a song together.
translations.ja: 一緒に歌を歌うのが好きです。

english: My brother is a very good piano player.

translations.en: My brother is a very good piano player.
translations.ja: 私の兄はとても上手にピアノを弾きます。

english: Wait for me there.

translations.en: Wait for me there.
translations.ja: そこで待っていて。

english: I am sorry for that.

translations.en: I am sorry for that.
translations.ja: それについてはごめんなさい。

english: Let us have a small party.

translations.en: Let us have a small party.
translations.ja: 小さなパーティーを開きましょう。

english: Do you want to play a game?

translations.en: Do you want to play a game?
translations.ja: ゲームをしたいですか？

english: I hope that you can come tomorrow morning.

translations.en: I hope that you can come tomorrow morning.
translations.ja: 明日の朝、あなたが来られることを願っています。

english: See you soon then.

translations.en: See you soon then.
translations.ja: では、またすぐに。

english: How do you feel today?

translations.en: How do you feel today?
translations.ja: 今日の気分はどうですか？

english: We go to the library now.

translations.en: We go to the library now.
translations.ja: 今、図書館へ行きます。

english: She has a small and cute dog.

translations.en: She has a small and cute dog.
translations.ja: 彼女は小さくて可愛い犬を飼っています。

english: I really like your new and blue shoes.

translations.en: I really like your new and blue shoes.
translations.ja: あなたの新しい青い靴が本当に好きです。

english: We go to the park.

translations.en: We go to the park.
translations.ja: 私たちは公園に行きます。

english: The bank is near the station.

translations.en: The bank is near the station.
translations.ja: 銀行は駅の近くにあります。

english: Many people visit the city museum daily.

translations.en: Many people visit the city museum daily.
translations.ja: 多くの人が毎日市内の博物館を訪れます。

english: The local library has many interesting English books.

translations.en: The local library has many interesting English books.
translations.ja: 地元の図書館には面白い英語の本がたくさんあります。

english: He works in a small store near the station.

translations.en: He works in a small store near the station.
translations.ja: 彼は駅の近くの小さな店で働いています。

english: We should follow the city rules to stay safe always.

translations.en: We should follow the city rules to stay safe always.
translations.ja: 常に安全でいるために、市の規則に従うべきです。

english: The shop is open now.

translations.en: The shop is open now.
translations.ja: 店は今開いています。

english: She is a very good doctor.

translations.en: She is a very good doctor.
translations.ja: 彼女はとても良い医者です。

english: Children play soccer in the large park.

translations.en: Children play soccer in the large park.
translations.ja: 子供たちが広い公園でサッカーをしています。

english: My mother is a teacher at the school.

translations.en: My mother is a teacher at the school.
translations.ja: 私の母はその学校の先生です。

english: The train arrives at the station in five minutes.

translations.en: The train arrives at the station in five minutes.
translations.ja: 電車は5分後に駅に到着します。

english: Many people use the city bus to go to work.

translations.en: Many people use the city bus to go to work.
translations.ja: 多くの人が市バスを使って仕事に行きます。

english: Call the police station now.

translations.en: Call the police station now.
translations.ja: 今すぐ警察署に電話して。

english: The hospital is over there now.

translations.en: The hospital is over there now.
translations.ja: 病院は今あそこにあります。

english: We should save water for the future.

translations.en: We should save water for the future.
translations.ja: 将来のために節水すべきです。

english: They produce many good cars in this city.

translations.en: They produce many good cars in this city.
translations.ja: この都市では多くの良い車が生産されています。

english: The local community center has a big swimming pool.

translations.en: The local community center has a big swimming pool.
translations.ja: 地元のコミュニティセンターには大きなプールがあります。

english: Visitors should show their tickets at the main entrance gate.

translations.en: Visitors should show their tickets at the main entrance gate.
translations.ja: 訪問者は正面入口のゲートでチケットを見せるべきです。

english: I study at school here.

translations.en: I study at school here.
translations.ja: 私はここで学校の勉強をしています。

english: The restaurant has good vegetable soup.

translations.en: The restaurant has good vegetable soup.
translations.ja: そのレストランには美味しい野菜スープがあります。

english: She buys food at the local market.

translations.en: She buys food at the local market.
translations.ja: 彼女は地元の市場で食べ物を買います。

english: He drives a large white truck every morning.

translations.en: He drives a large white truck every morning.
translations.ja: 彼は毎朝大きな白いトラックを運転します。

english: The city museum is very quiet on Monday morning.

translations.en: The city museum is very quiet on Monday morning.
translations.ja: 月曜日の朝、市内の博物館はとても静かです。

english: Everyone should be careful when they cross the busy street.

translations.en: Everyone should be careful when they cross the busy street.
translations.ja: 賑やかな通りを渡る時は、誰もが気をつけるべきです。

english: We share the same big room.

translations.en: We share the same big room.
translations.ja: 私たちは同じ広い部屋を共有しています。

english: Education is the key to a better future.

translations.en: Education is the key to a better future.
translations.ja: 教育はより良い未来への鍵です。

english: Technology makes life much easier for many people now.

translations.en: Technology makes life much easier for many people now.
translations.ja: テクノロジーによって、多くの人々の生活が今よりずっと楽になっています。

english: Comparing these two plans helps us make a better decision.

translations.en: Comparing these two plans helps us make a better decision.
translations.ja: これら2つの計画を比較することで、より良い決断を下せます。

english: Innovation is the key to creating a wonderful future for children.

translations.en: Innovation is the key to creating a wonderful future for children.
translations.ja: 革新は子供たちのために素晴らしい未来を創造するための鍵です。

english: Success in life often comes to those who never give up easily.

translations.en: Success in life often comes to those who never give up easily.
translations.ja: 人生の成功は、決して簡単にあきらめない人たちにしばしば訪れます。

english: It is essential to communicate effectively with all your team members every day.

translations.en: It is essential to communicate effectively with all your team members every day.
translations.ja: 毎日、チームメンバー全員と効果的にコミュニケーションをとることが不可欠です。

english: Environment and choices influence human growth and development in many ways.

translations.en: Environment and choices influence human growth and development in many ways.
translations.ja: 環境と選択は、多くの面で人間の成長と発達に影響を与えます。

english: Continuous learning is very important as it allows us to adapt to a changing world now.

translations.en: Continuous learning is very important as it allows us to adapt to a changing world now.
translations.ja: 絶え間ない学習は、今の変化し続ける世界に適応させてくれるので、とても重要です。

english: Honesty is vital for a healthy relationship.

translations.en: Honesty is vital for a healthy relationship.
translations.ja: 誠実さは健全な関係に不可欠です。

english: Health is a very valuable asset for us.

translations.en: Health is a very valuable asset for us.
translations.ja: 健康は私たちにとって非常に貴重な財産です。

english: Every action has a natural and very direct reaction.

translations.en: Every action has a natural and very direct reaction.
translations.ja: すべての行動には自然で直接的な反応があります。

english: I am sure that we can achieve our goals together.

translations.en: I am sure that we can achieve our goals together.
translations.ja: 一緒に目標を達成できると確信しています。

english: Consider all the possible risks before you start a new plan.

translations.en: Consider all the possible risks before you start a new plan.
translations.ja: 新しい計画を始める前に、考えられるすべてのリスクを考慮してください。

english: Think about the right answer before you speak your opinion in the class.

translations.en: Think about the right answer before you speak your opinion in the class.
translations.ja: クラスで意見を述べる前に、正しい答えについて考えてください。

english: The simple solution is often the best way to move forward in difficult times.

translations.en: The simple solution is often the best way to move forward in difficult times.
translations.ja: 困難な時期には、単純な解決策がしばしば前進するための最善の方法となります。

english: We should analyze the data carefully to find the main reason for the problem.

translations.en: We should analyze the data carefully to find the main reason for the problem.
translations.ja: 問題の主な理由を見つけるために、データを注意深く分析すべきです。

english: Technology plays a vital role in our daily lives by providing us with much useful information.

translations.en: Technology plays a vital role in our daily lives by providing us with much useful information.
translations.ja: テクノロジーは、多くの有用な情報を提供することで、私たちの日常生活で重要な役割を果たしています。

english: Experience is always a very great teacher.

translations.en: Experience is always a very great teacher.
translations.ja: 経験は常に非常に優れた教師です。

english: It is necessary to stay focused on tasks.

translations.en: It is necessary to stay focused on tasks.
translations.ja: タスクに集中し続けることが必要です。

english: History shows that change is necessary for human growth.

translations.en: History shows that change is necessary for human growth.
translations.ja: 歴史は、人間の成長には変化が必要であることを示しています。

english: We must think about how our actions change the natural world.

translations.en: We must think about how our actions change the natural world.
translations.ja: 私たちの行動が自然界をどのように変えるか考えなければなりません。

english: Knowledge is a powerful tool for solving many complex problems in life.

translations.en: Knowledge is a powerful tool for solving many complex problems in life.
translations.ja: 知識は、人生の多くの複雑な問題を解決するための強力な道具です。

english: Innovation leads to a much better world for the next generation of children.

translations.en: Innovation leads to a much better world for the next generation of children.
translations.ja: 革新は、次世代の子供たちのために、より良い世界へとつながります。

english: True happiness comes from finding joy in the simple things we do every day.

translations.en: True happiness comes from finding joy in the simple things we do every day.
translations.ja: 本当の幸せは、毎日行う単純なことの中に喜びを見出すことから生まれます。

english: It is important to respect different cultures and opinions to build a peaceful society now.

translations.en: It is important to respect different cultures and opinions to build a peaceful society now.
translations.ja: 平和な社会を築くためには、異なる文化や意見を尊重することが重要です。

english: I have eaten my lunch.

translations.en: I have eaten my lunch.
translations.ja: お昼ご飯を食べました。

english: She has visited a museum before.

translations.en: She has visited a museum before.
translations.ja: 彼女は以前に博物館を訪れたことがあります。

english: This book was written by my brother.

translations.en: This book was written by my brother.
translations.ja: この本は私の兄によって書かれました。

english: I want to know where she goes.

translations.en: I want to know where she goes.
translations.ja: 彼女がどこへ行くのか知りたいです。

english: The girl who is playing the piano is sister.

translations.en: The girl who is playing the piano is sister.
translations.ja: ピアノを弾いている女の子は妹です。

english: I think that this is the best way to study.

translations.en: I think that this is the best way to study.
translations.ja: これが一番良い学習方法だと思います。

english: He was watching a movie when I spoke to him then.

translations.en: He was watching a movie when I spoke to him then.
translations.ja: その時、私が彼に話しかけたとき、彼は映画を見ていました。

english: You should not be late for the English class at the school today.

translations.en: You should not be late for the English class at the school today.
translations.ja: 今日、学校の英語の授業に遅れてはいけません。

english: She is better than me.

translations.en: She is better than me.
translations.ja: 彼女は私より上手です。

english: He can speak English very well.

translations.en: He can speak English very well.
translations.ja: 彼は英語をとても上手に話せます。

english: The book which is on the desk.

translations.en: The book which is on the desk.
translations.ja: 机の上にある本。

english: My mother told me to buy some milk.

translations.en: My mother told me to buy some milk.
translations.ja: 母は私に牛乳を買うように言いました。

english: I am glad to hear that you are better.

translations.en: I am glad to hear that you are better.
translations.ja: あなたが良くなったと聞いて嬉しいです。

english: Have you ever seen a blue bird in this park before?

translations.en: Have you ever seen a blue bird in this park before?
translations.ja: 以前にこの公園で青い鳥を見たことがありますか？

english: The house which was built ten years ago is still very nice.

translations.en: The house which was built ten years ago is still very nice.
translations.ja: 10年前に建てられたその家は、今でもとても素敵です。

english: I have been living in this small city since I was a child.

translations.en: I have been living in this small city since I was a child.
translations.ja: 私は子供の頃からこの小さな街に住んでいます。

english: They are going to Kyoto.

translations.en: They are going to Kyoto.
translations.ja: 彼らは京都へ行く予定です。

english: I do not know his name.

translations.en: I do not know his name.
translations.ja: 彼の名前を知りません。

english: She has been sick for two days.

translations.en: She has been sick for two days.
translations.ja: 彼女は2日間病気です。

english: This is the school where my brother works.

translations.en: This is the school where my brother works.
translations.ja: ここが私の兄が働いている学校です。

english: I hope that you will have a nice time.

translations.en: I hope that you will have a nice time.
translations.ja: あなたが楽しい時間を過ごせるよう願っています。

english: There is a large tree in front of our school gate.

translations.en: There is a large tree in front of our school gate.
translations.ja: 私たちの学校の門の前に大きな木があります。

english: My older sister is much taller than my younger brother is now.

translations.en: My older sister is much taller than my younger brother is now.
translations.ja: 今、私の姉は私の弟よりもずっと背が高いです。

english: I have to finish my science project before I go to bed tonight.

translations.en: I have to finish my science project before I go to bed tonight.
translations.ja: 今夜寝る前に、理科のプロジェクトを終わらせなければなりません。

english: The room must be made clean now.

translations.en: The room must be made clean now.
translations.ja: 部屋は今、きれいにされなければなりません。
